description: tests/create_list.rs:105 asserts that 'bl list --status blocked' output does not contain the substring 'bb'. The test creates two tasks with titles 'aa' and 'bb'. The blocked-list output includes the 'aa' task's auto-generated 4-hex ID (bl-XXXX). Roughly 1/256 IDs contain the substring 'bb' (e.g. bl-bbXX, bl-Xbb0), causing intermittent failures. Same risk for 'aa'. Fix: use task titles that can't appear in 4-hex IDs (e.g. 'task-one'/'task-two'), or filter the output to lines that don't start with the ID column. Reproduced 2026-04-13 during a make check run on bl-5650's pre-commit hook.
title: Flaky test: story_11_list_filtered_by_status
